REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $4,298.20 RE 23707 FOR TRANSACTION W0809619D002 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO JESUS A MARTINEZ, DOC #1902176812, WARRANT #38003203, DATED JUL-28-2009

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, JESUS A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAHALAK, SUSAN ELLEN $4,223.20 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,298.20, THE COURT FINDS THE TOTAL DAMAGES ATTRIBUTABLE TO THE ACCIDENT TO BE $10,558.00. FURHER, THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT TO BE 40% AT FAULT FOR THE ACCIDENT FOR A TOTAL NET AWARD OF $4223.20 PLUS COST OF SUIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
